title: tigridia tepoxtlana
intro: Tigridia tepoxtlana, also known as the Mexican tiger flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Tigridia tepoxtlana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
